text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are visiting a<n>shrine, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, gods! Make my brilliance<n>shine brighter
still! May my grace<n>bring greater warmth unto all...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As it is so. Thus, on these shoulders, I<n>bear the
weight of all aspirations. I, on<n>the Overlord's path...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Phew... Hopefully the gods will bein a better mood now.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You see, I have been so busy in<n>my
overlordly duties serving the<n>people that I haven't
had time to<n>come visit them.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What can be troubling is if I offend the<n>gods once,
they'll play foul tricks on<n>my health to get
attention.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I cannot deliver my radiance to the<n>world with this
shadow cast unto me!<n>That is why...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... This is the worst timing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Have you also come here to<n>speak with me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No! I just... wanted to look at the<n>stars.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Concealing your true aspirations in<n>the face of my
majesty—how<n>courageous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With my brilliance that shines brighter<n>than any
star, I shall fulfill your<n>precious little desire!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, where are you going with this?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: FLASH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wh-what is that light?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My ambition, of course!
choice_data_list: No, that's got to be the moon...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's no way... The moon could<n>never be that
bright.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha ha! My splendor is<n>supreme!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Is the light we're seeing from the<n>moon, or could it
truly be T.M. Opera<n>O's shining ambition?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, the shadow cast<n>over her has
been cleared! Her<n>commanding radiance is
returned!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Crack! Boom! Rumble...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! The gods lament... It would<n>seem they want
me all to themselves.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fear not—I am the Overlord! It is my<n>duty to spread
my affection equally!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter if storm clouds brew... or<n>my health
crumble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me, gods! I shall cry out again,<n>and still more,
until you finally<n>understand!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Dark clouds continue to shadow T.M.<n>Opera O's
radiance.
